response.overview: Ever since Molly (Syren De Mer)'s husband passed away, she's been in a state of shock. Unfortunately, that means that her two teen step-sons, Paul (Ricky Spanish) and Justin (Alex Jett) have had to pick up the pieces of their broken lives. Molly's just so out of it these days that they can't even leave her alone by herself without fear of her hurting herself or accidentally flooding the house.
response.title: Taking Care Of Mom
